Write a funny, 150+ word ad for an attorney who helps poor people with their divorces. Highlight at least 3 text sections by italicize them with markdown (i.e. *highlighted section*).<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

**Divorce Made Easy (Sort Of)**

Are you tired of being married to someone who still thinks the 80s are cool? Do you want to escape the clutches of a spouse who insists on wearing pleated pants? Look no further! Our attorney, "Divorce Dave," is here to help you navigate the treacherous waters of divorce, even if you're on a tight budget.

*Don't worry, we won't make you choose between paying for a lawyer and paying for food. Our services are affordable, and we'll even throw in some free advice on how to cook ramen noodles without burning the pot.*

At our law firm, we understand that divorce can be a difficult and emotional process. That's why we offer a range of services, including:

* *Uncontested divorce: Because who needs a fight when you can just agree to disagree?*
* *Mediation: Where we'll help you and your ex-spouse find common ground, or at least a compromise on who gets the cat.*
* *Free consultations: Because we want to make sure you're comfortable with our services before we start charging you an arm and a leg.*

So why wait? Contact us today to schedule a consultation and start your journey towards a happier, more pleated-pants-free **Divorce Made Easy (Sort Of)**

Are you tired of being married to someone who still thinks the 80s are cool? Do you want to escape the clutches of a spouse who insists on wearing pleated pants? Look no further! Our attorney, "Divorce Dave," is here to help you navigate the treacherous waters of divorce, even if you're on a tight budget.

*Don't worry, we won't make you choose between paying for a lawyer and paying for food. Our services are affordable, and we'll even throw in some free advice on how to cook ramen noodles without burning the pot.*

At our law firm, we understand that divorce can be a difficult and emotional process. That's why we offer a range of services, including:

* *Uncontested divorce: Because who needs a fight when you can just agree to disagree?*
* *Mediation: Where we'll help you and your ex-spouse find common ground, or at least a compromise on who gets the cat.*
* *Free consultations: Because we want to make sure you're comfortable with our services before we start charging you an arm and a leg.*

So why wait? Contact us today to schedule a consultation and start your journey towards a happier, more pleated-pants-free life.
